chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-227 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 15-09-2025 None present for the petitioner. Syed Naveed Ali Shah, D.A.G. **** None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received so far. This petition was filed in the year 2019 and lastly it was fixed in Court on 30.11.2022, when none was present on behalf of the petitioner. Thereafter, no steps have been taken by the petitioner to have the matter fixed in Court, which reflects that either the petitioner has lost his interest in proceeding with this matter or the purpose for which instant petition was filed, has been achieved. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
